sources.description: Translated by Albert H. Newman. From Nicene and Post-Nicene Fathers, First Series, Vol. 4, Edited by Philip Schaff, Buffalo, NY: Christian Literature Publishing Co 1887. Revised and edited for New Advent by Kevin Knight.
